$notes.orphan_writer_feature: At (3,7), the spec requires activation properties to be paired with the corresponding feature in writerFeatures. Writing an activation property for a feature absent from writerFeatures is invalid committed state.

cases.name: invariants_create_table_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with a delta.invariants column but invariants absent from writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: invariants_empty_commit_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table with a delta.invariants column but invariants absent from writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: invariants_create_table_1_2_with_invariant_schema
cases.description: Creating a (1,2) table with a delta.invariants column metadata succeeds: invariants are always supported at writer version 2.

cases.name: invariants_empty_commit_1_2_with_invariant_schema
cases.description: Appending to a (1,2) table with a delta.invariants column succeeds.

cases.name: invariants_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with a delta.invariants column but invariants absent from writerFeatures succeeds; invariants is writer-only.

cases.name: invariants_supported_not_active_empty_commit_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[invariants] table without any delta.invariants column metadata succeeds: the feature is supported but not active.

cases.name: invariants_supported_active_empty_commit_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[invariants] table with a delta.invariants column succeeds.

cases.name: invariants_create_table_1_1_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,1) table with a delta.invariants column succeeds; writer version 1 predates the invariants feature and the spec does not prohibit committing the metadata.

cases.name: invariants_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[invariants] table with a delta.invariants column succeeds.

cases.name: invariants_read_snapshot_1_2_with_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,2) table with a delta.invariants column succeeds: invariants is writer-only and does not affect the reader.

cases.name: invariants_read_snapshot_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[invariants] table with a delta.invariants column succeeds: invariants is writer-only.

cases.name: invariants_supported_not_active_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[invariants] table without any delta.invariants column succeeds: the feature is supported but not active.

cases.name: invariants_cm_create_table_3_7_both_features_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[columnMapping,invariants] table with a CM-annotated column with a delta.invariants expression succeeds.

cases.name: invariants_cm_empty_commit_3_7_both_features_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[columnMapping,invariants] table with a CM-annotated column with a delta.invariants expression succeeds.
